eco_tips.isi: Use reusable bags, reusable bottles, and avoid single-use plastic.
Turn off lights, unplug chargers, and use natural sunlight when possible.
Take shorter showers and turn off taps when not in use.

greenwashing.isi: Greenwashing is when a company claims to be environmentally friendly without taking real environmental action.
Products may use words like eco, natural, or green without proof.
Check certifications, company reports, and evidence behind environmental claims.
